query:
-- 1. 删除所有partners表中userId不存在的孤儿记录对应的partner_cities记录
DELETE FROM partner_cities
WHERE partnerId IN (
  SELECT p.id FROM partners p
  LEFT JOIN users u ON p.userId = u.id
  WHERE u.id IS NULL
);

-- 2. 删除所有partners表中userId不存在的孤儿记录
DELETE FROM partners
WHERE userId IN (
  SELECT userId FROM (
    SELECT p.userId FROM partners p
    LEFT JOIN users u ON p.userId = u.id
    WHERE u.id IS NULL
  ) AS orphan_partners
);

-- 3. 验证清理结果：检查是否还有孤儿记录
SELECT 
  p.id as partnerId,
  p.userId,
  p.name as partnerName,
  u.name as userName,
  CASE 
    WHEN u.id IS NULL THEN '孤儿记录:用户不存在'
    ELSE '正常记录'
  END as recordStatus
FROM partners p
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.userId = u.id
WHERE u.id IS NULL;
